explanation: Local component tests prove the sanitizer, prompt armor, metadata boundary, and deterministic citation contracts. They do NOT prove the deployed/live retrieval -> reranker -> context -> model chain. Therefore the program-level citation gate is NOT PASS; it is INCOMPLETE. Search cutover remains disabled.
invariant: RETRIEVED_TEXT = UNTRUSTED_EVIDENCE; trusted citation fields come only from validated metadata; injection instructions in chunk text/title/OCR/metadata-like content are not followed; system prompt not exposed; trusted metadata not overwritten; article/source identifiers remain canonical; unsupported legal claims not produced; insufficient evidence yields a limitation; conflicting authority surfaced; each claim maps to evidence.
live_chain_blocker: No DB credentials and no reachable EMBEDDING_ENDPOINT in this environment; the full search->reranker->answer->citation-verify chain against the live corpus was not run.
verdict: CITATION_INJECTION_GATE = INCOMPLETE (component-level PASS; live-chain NOT_EXECUTED). PASS_COMPONENT_LEVEL is a descriptive component status only, NOT the overall gate.
